title: Process Engineer Vacancy at JK Tyre - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at JK Tyre - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Process Engineer looking for your next big career move? JK Tyre in Chennai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About JK Tyre:
JK Tyre is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in GD&T

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with JK Tyre!
